training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

artifact_usage_claims.usage: loads real STRING keep20 graph TSV and computes normalized top-20 target-neighbor smoothing weights
uses official target-gene order/count and fixed DEG label task contract

pipeline_program.representation: official K562 AIDO+GNN cached features inherited from parent lineage
pipeline_program.target_side: official target genes aligned by Ensembl IDs to STRING graph
pipeline_program.head: dense DEG head plus learnable Laplacian smoothing coefficient
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: planned STRING Laplacian prior over real graph artifact; no fabricated edges or proxy model
